name: Calculateur de Variation en Pourcentage
desc: Calculez l'augmentation ou la diminution en pourcentage entre deux valeurs.
description: Calculez l'augmentation ou la diminution en pourcentage entre deux valeurs.
seo_title: Calculateur de Variation Pourcentage en Ligne
seo_description: Calculez l'augmentation ou la diminution en pourcentage entre deux valeurs. Gratuit, rapide et sans inscription.
example_label: Calculate the percentage increase from 1,to 1,487.units sold month-over-month

range_hints.valor_final: Can be higher or lower than initial for growth/decline

result_context: The cambio_pct of {cambio_pct}% represents the relative change from initial to Final value, while diferencia ({diferencia}) shows the absolute numeric difference.
mistakes: Dividing by Final value instead of initial value
Not using absolute value of initial when it's negative
Confusing percentage point change with percentage change
